GemSaviourConquestPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWildOnTheWayFeature1: During any spins, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol, Scatter symbol and +1 Free Spin symbol) in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 that occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces may have a silver frame around itself.
GemSaviourConquestPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWildOnTheWayFeature2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any silver-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into a randomly selected symbol (other than Wild symbol, Scatter symbol and +1 Free Spin symbol) with a gold frame around itself.
GemSaviourConquestPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWildOnTheWayFeature3: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any gold-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into 2 to 4 Wild symbols depending on the number of symbol spaces occupied by that gold-framed symbol.
GemSaviourConquestPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature1: 4 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 12 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
GemSaviourConquestPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature2: A Witch will appear above the reels with her health bar indicated below her and the win multiplier starts with x2.
GemSaviourConquestPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature3: Each winning symbol that explodes (excluding silver-framed symbols and gold-framed symbols) will reduce the Witch's health bar by 1.
GemSaviourConquestPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature4: If the Witch's health bar is reduced to 0, the Witch is defeated and win multiplier is increased by 2. The Witch's health bar will be replenished before the next round of result is shown.
GemSaviourConquestPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature5: The Witch can be defeated multiple times and the win multiplier can be increased multiple times in a Free Spins Feature.
GemSaviourConquestPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature6: During any round of free spin, one or more 1 x 1 symbol(s) (excluding Wild symbol and +1 Free Spin symbol) may be transformed into gold-framed symbol(s).
GemSaviourConquestPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature7: At the end of every free spin, 1 free spin is awarded for each +1 Free Spin symbol on the reels (if any).
GemSaviourConquestPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue1: Bet ways win if the winning symbols are in succession from the leftmost reel to right.
GemSaviourConquestPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue2: Total number of winning bet ways for each symbol are calculated by multiplying the number of adjacent winning symbols on each symbols from leftmost reel to right.
GemSaviourConquestPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue3: The winning symbol payout is multiplied by the number of winning bet ways.
GemSaviourConquestPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue4: Some symbols (excluding Wild symbol, Scatter symbol, +1 Free Spin symbol) in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 may occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
GemSaviourConquestPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue5: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol and +1 Free Spin symbol.
GemSaviourConquestPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue6: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.
GemSaviourConquestPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue7: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
GemSaviourConquestPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue8: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.

GemSaviourConquestRules.GeneralRules1: Gem Saviour Conquest is a 6-reel, 6-row video slot featuring Wilds-on-the-Way and free spins with win multiplier.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for 576 ways - %{46656} ways, bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

GemSaviourConquestRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
GemSaviourConquestRules.FreeSpinFeature1: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the Witch's health bar value is 6.
GemSaviourConquestRules.FreeSpinFeature2: After the Witch is defeated, the Witch's health bar value is replenished to the value equals to the previous health bar value plus 2.
GemSaviourConquestRules.FreeSpinFeature3: The maximum Witch's health bar value is 16.
